title: Record real marketer UAT or explicit owner defer
description: Run the current UAT handoff with Wilku/marketer or record an explicit owner defer. This is the only acceptable blocker for claiming usefulness beyond technical readiness.
design: Use docs/handoffs/2026-06-29-marketer-uat-ready.md as the current handoff. Do not substitute simulated walkthroughs for real UAT.
acceptance_criteria: docs/handoffs contains the UAT result or explicit owner defer. docs/PROGRESS.md and docs/goals/001-goal.md state the outcome without claiming real UAT if it did not happen. goal_001_completion_check reflects the same state.

title: Goal 001: clean marketer cockpit and product semantics
description: Track the remaining work for Goal 001: clean WILQ active product semantics, marketer-facing Polish surfaces, condensation, URL semantics and proof before moving to later MOS layers.
design: PLAN.md remains the canonical cleanup plan. Beads tracks operational work and dependencies; it does not replace product docs or WILQ knowledge cards.
acceptance_criteria: Goal 001 completion check passes or remaining work is explicitly represented as open beads with owner/UAT blocker noted. PLAN.md, docs/goals/001-goal.md and docs/PROGRESS.md stay short and aligned.

title: Wire beads into WILQ repo
description: Install bd, initialize beads in the repository and accept the generated AGENTS.md workflow instructions so active cleanup work can move into a dependency-aware issue graph.
design: Beads tracks development issues only. WILQ product knowledge remains in typed knowledge cards and PLAN/PLANS/docs remain the product/recovery sources.
acceptance_criteria: bd version works, bd status shows the workspace, AGENTS.md contains beads workflow guidance, .beads is initialized and the initialization commit is present.
close_reason: Installed bd 1.0.4, initialized .beads, accepted generated AGENTS.md workflow instructions and created the Goal 001 task graph.

title: Strengthen language and logic guardrails without test theater
description: Promote repeated cleanup findings into focused guardrails: marketer language guard, context-pack guard, content URL semantics, route tests, API contract assertions or skill smokes. Guardrails must catch real regressions, not just count words.
design: Prefer narrow checks near the producing source. Do not block technical fields in schemas when they are not shown to the marketer.
acceptance_criteria: Each new or changed guardrail has a concrete failure it would catch and is referenced from the related issue/progress note. scripts/verify.sh or focused gates include the guardrail when appropriate.
notes: Slice proof 2026-06-29: marketer language guard now blocks bare Ads missing status/channel copy. Verified tests/test_marketer_language_guard.py, scripts/marketer_language_guard.py, static rg for old literals and git diff --check.

title: Move remaining raw labels and vendor enum fallbacks into API labels
description: Continue replacing raw snake_case, vendor enums, source names, blocker names and evidence/source summaries visible to the marketer with typed API/domain labels. UI can format numbers, but must not invent business meaning.
design: Use typed schema/view-model/domain label fields. Technical IDs and raw enums may remain in technical detail, audit trace and internal schema fields.
acceptance_criteria: Newly touched API/dashboard tests prove unknown vendor/read-contract states do not fall back to raw English or snake_case on primary surfaces. No React replaceLabel/remapper layer is introduced.
notes:
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Ads missing status/channel fallbacks now say 'status kampanii niepotwierdzony', 'typ kampanii niepotwierdzony' and 'status słowa niepotwierdzony' at API/domain source. Verified focused pytest, App route test, ruff I/F, marketer language guard, rg for old literals and agent-browser read of /ads-doctor.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Workflow missing-contract detail hydration now returns 'Dane kompletne dla tego procesu' instead of a bare missing-state fallback when no workflow contracts are missing. Verified focused workflow API tests, ruff I/F, marketer/context-pack language guards, live /api/workflows proof and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Ads change-history resource, operation and change-source fallbacks now explain unconfirmed state from API/domain labels instead of context-free missing placeholders. Verified focused Ads API tests, ruff I/F, marketer/context-pack language guards, live Ads diagnostics proof and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Localo read-contract and access labels now explain unconfirmed/unconnected data scopes from API/domain copy instead of bare missing-data placeholders. Command Center Localo summary now handles full vs partial Localo evidence without empty missing-contract phrasing. Verified focused Localo/API tests, ruff I/F, marketer language guard, live /api/localo/diagnostics proof, context-pack guard and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Knowledge operating-map bindings now use a full operator sentence for complete missing-contract detail labels instead of a bare fallback. Verified focused API tests, Knowledge/App dashboard tests, ruff I/F, marketer/context-pack guards, live /api/knowledge/operating-map proof and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Ads business-context metric tiles now explain missing margin, business goal, budget goal and strategy review states as concrete operator states instead of bare placeholders. Also tightened the live Ads diagnostics campaign-row fixture to assert operator metric labels. Verified focused Ads API tests, App dashboard test, ruff I/F, marketer/context-pack guards, live /api/ads/diagnostics proof and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Daily, Ads, Ahrefs and Merchant missing status labels now describe unconfirmed data scopes instead of bare missing-data copy in active briefing contracts. Verified focused API label tests, App dashboard test, ruff I/F, marketer/context-pack guards, live command-center/Ads/Merchant/Ahrefs status-label proof and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Content action labels now describe missing content contracts and unavailable GSC metrics as unconfirmed source data instead of bare missing placeholders. Verified focused API/helper tests, App dashboard test, ruff I/F, marketer/context-pack guards, live content action string scan and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Action preview, Content, GA4 and tactical WordPress/Ads fallback labels now describe the unconfirmed fact instead of bare 'brak'/'brak danych' copy. No React remapper or stale alias was added. Verified focused API tests, App/ActionDetail dashboard tests, ruff I/F, marketer/context/operator language guards, live API proof and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Command Center, evidence freshness, GA4/Merchant freshness and Ads recommendation impact copy no longer use bare 'brak danych'/'brak odczytu' or false zero-cost impact for unknown data. Verified focused API/dashboard tests, ruff I/F, live /api/dashboard/command-center scan, marketer/context/operator language guards and git diff --check.

title: Remove stale dev-preview and migration semantics from active contracts
description: Find active references that treat ekologus.dev.proudsite.pl, target_site, migration, mapping-review or migration-map semantics as current product logic. Dev hosts are optional design/staging previews only; ekologus.pl remains canonical public content home.
design: Historical archives may mention old terms. Active contracts should use source_public_url, preview_url, intended_final_url and final_canonical_url only where that URL concept is actually needed.
acceptance_criteria: Active docs, API output, dashboard copy, skill contracts and eval fixtures do not present dev preview as final/canonical/SEO target. Any touched stale fields are migrated directly instead of preserved as compatibility aliases. Existing content remains preserve-first.
close_reason: Active dev-preview/migration audit passed. rg over active API/dashboard/schema/skill code found only guard/smoke references; focused operator endpoint/content URL tests, marketer language guard and live_contract_smoke all passed.

title: Audit and condense main marketer surfaces
description: Audit /command-center, /merchant, /content-planner, /ads-doctor, /ga4, /localo, /knowledge, /actions and action detail for first-screen usefulness. Each surface must answer what to do, why, blocker, proof freshness and next safe step without exposing technical internals first.
design: Do not use route-level translator maps or replaceLabel helpers. If a decision explanation is canonical, it belongs in typed API/domain view-model.
acceptance_criteria: Each touched route has focused tests and browser proof. Any first-screen copy that does not defend the decision is fixed at API/view-model source when canonical, or in UI only for display-only framing. Technical details stay in drawers/details.
notes:
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Content metric tile null values now render 'metryka niepotwierdzona' instead of a bare missing-state word. Verified focused dashboard test, marketer language guard, git diff --check and agent-browser read of /content-planner.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Shared MetricFactChips now render an unknown trend direction as 'zmiana: kierunek niepotwierdzony' instead of 'zmiana: brak'. Verified focused component test, marketer language guard, git diff --check and agent-browser read of /localo.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Merchant first-screen fallbacks for report counts, problem resolution and product samples no longer use bare missing-state copy. Verified Merchant source/render tests, marketer language guard, git diff --check and agent-browser read of /merchant.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: workflow cards now explain missing dedicated route/view instead of rendering bare missing-view fallback text. Verified WorkflowPanels test, marketer language guard, static rg for old fallback and git diff --check.

title: Keep PLAN, PLANS, PROGRESS and beads aligned without append-only clutter
description: Use beads as the operational graph while keeping PLAN.md, PLANS.md, docs/PROGRESS.md and docs/goals/001-goal.md short. Remove outdated active-plan text instead of adding parallel narratives.
design: PLAN.md remains canonical for product rules; PLANS.md remains long-range; docs/PROGRESS.md remains current readout; beads tracks operational work and dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: Recovery docs point to beads for task graph, contain only current facts and do not duplicate the full issue list. bd ready shows the next actionable work after each slice.
